Transparent pricing for commercial and residential electrical services in Denver & Colorado Springs.

Free Phone Estimate

Scott Skiles offers free estimates over the phone. Call now to discuss your project and get a preliminary quote with no obligation.

Residential Diagnostics

Starting at $100/hour

In-person troubleshooting and diagnostics for residential electrical systems.

  • Complete system evaluation
  • Detailed troubleshooting report
  • Upfront repair recommendations

Commercial Diagnostics

Starting at $200/hour

In-person troubleshooting and diagnostics for commercial and industrial electrical systems.

  • Industrial-grade testing equipment
  • PLC, VFD, and control system diagnostics
  • Code compliance assessment
  • Project scope and timeline estimates
